Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Reverb Type
Fields.Description: Specifies the reverb type to apply during the cutscene

Fields.Name: BGM Behavior Type On Start
Fields.Description: Specifies normal BGM behavior at the start of cutscenes

Fields.Name: One-shot BGM Behavior Type On Start
Fields.Description: Specifies the one-shot BGM behavior at the start of the cutscene

Fields.Name: Post Play SE ID
Fields.Description: SEID (category: p) specification to post at the end of the cutscene (-1: do not post)

Fields.Name: Post Play SE ID for Skip
Fields.Description: SEID_ for skipping to post at the end of the cutscene (category: p) specified (-1: not posted)

Fields.Name: Enter Map Mute Stop Time on Draw Cutscene
Fields.Description: Cutscene drawing time to unmute immediately after entering [seconds] (less than 0: not canceled in drawing time)
